content:
Read what you wrote for the Week 1 Warm-Up assignment. Was it interesting? Does it sound like your voice? Could it have been better? Write your thoughts in 250 words on what you wrote.

Save your completed Week 2 Weekly Writing Warm-Up using the proper naming convention.
Estimated Time for Completion
The estimated time to complete this activity is 5 minutes.


Week 2 | Discussion: Using Descriptive Language
Using Descriptive Language
Instructions
Your discussion will occur in class.

Discussion Topic
This week, to introduce the concepts of description, we will play a game! Pick your favorite food and write a few sentences describing it in detail. Use all the senses to bring it to life. But DON'T tell us what food you are describing! It will be up to your peers to guess. This is meant to be an exercise to stretch your mind and think about how you would describe a particular food to someone who may never have tasted it before. Feel free to use metaphors, similes, or personification!
